metadata.purpose: Deterministic notification-fatigue policy. Decides immediate / digest / in_app_only / suppress from verdict, signal strength, personal relevance, action clarity, novelty, duplicate state, and seller preferences. All thresholds editable here — never hard-coded in components.

reason_codes.noise_suppressed: Verdict is NOISE; never alerted per policy.
reason_codes.no_valid_action: No specific next action; nothing to act on.
reason_codes.missing_recipient: No routed recipient for this lane.
reason_codes.below_min_signal: Signal strength below the configured minimum.
reason_codes.below_min_actionability: Action clarity below the configured minimum.
reason_codes.low_personal_relevance_digest: Personal relevance below the immediate threshold; routed to digest.
reason_codes.duplicate_no_change: Same opportunity motion already alerted with no material change.
reason_codes.daily_limit_reached: Daily immediate-alert limit reached; routed to digest.
reason_codes.quiet_hours: Within the recipient's quiet hours; routed to digest.
reason_codes.high_relevance_immediate: High personal relevance with a clear action.
reason_codes.material_change_delta: Material change since last alert justifies a delta notification.
